mapper.select:
SELECT tb_vlt_crd_idx AS idx, tb_vlt_crd_uuid AS uuid, mbr_acct_idx AS mbrAcctIdx, ttl, lgn_id AS lgnId, pwd, memo, created_by AS createdBy, updated_by AS updatedBy, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt, del_at AS delAt FROM tb_vlt_crd WHERE mbr_acct_idx = #{mbrAcctIdx} AND del_at IS NULL
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM tb_vlt_crd_cat vcc INNER JOIN tb_vlt_cat vc ON vc.tb_vlt_cat_idx = vcc.tb_vlt_cat_idx WHERE vcc.tb_vlt_crd_idx = tb_vlt_crd.tb_vlt_crd_idx AND vc.tb_vlt_cat_uuid IN (
CAST(#{categoryUuid} AS UUID)
) AND vc.del_at IS NULL )
AND ( ttl ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keywordToken}, '%') OR COALESCE(lgn_id, '') ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keywordToken}, '%') OR COALESCE(memo, '') ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keywordToken}, '%') )
ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT tb_vlt_crd_idx AS idx, tb_vlt_crd_uuid AS uuid, mbr_acct_idx AS mbrAcctIdx, ttl, lgn_id AS lgnId, pwd, memo, created_by AS createdBy, updated_by AS updatedBy, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt, del_at AS delAt FROM tb_vlt_crd WHERE tb_vlt_crd_idx = #{idx} AND del_at IS NULL

SELECT tb_vlt_crd_idx AS idx, tb_vlt_crd_uuid AS uuid, mbr_acct_idx AS mbrAcctIdx, ttl, lgn_id AS lgnId, pwd, memo, created_by AS createdBy, updated_by AS updatedBy, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt, del_at AS delAt FROM tb_vlt_crd WHERE tb_vlt_crd_uuid = CAST(#{uuid} AS UUID) AND mbr_acct_idx = #{mbrAcctIdx} AND del_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_vlt_crd ( mbr_acct_idx, ttl, lgn_id, pwd, memo, created_by ) VALUES ( #{mbrAcctIdx}, #{ttl}, #{lgnId}, #{pwd}, #{memo}, #{createdBy} )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_vlt_crd SET ttl = #{ttl}, lgn_id = #{lgnId}, pwd = #{pwd}, memo = #{memo}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = now() WHERE tb_vlt_crd_uuid = CAST(#{uuid} AS UUID) AND mbr_acct_idx = #{mbrAcctIdx} AND del_at IS NULL
UPDATE tb_vlt_crd SET del_at = now(), updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = now() WHERE tb_vlt_crd_uuid = CAST(#{uuid} AS UUID) AND mbr_acct_idx = #{mbrAcctIdx} AND del_at IS NULL
